summary: Soundboard capture with slightly over‑driven bass but an excellent all‑electric performance.
review: The recording, a stereo soundboard (sbd) source, is generally clear and well balanced aside from a noticeably over‑driven bass that may require EQ adjustment. The show itself is praised as a solid electric set following two acoustic numbers, with Jerry Garcia’s guitar work highlighted as cutting through the mix. Overall fans are enthusiastic about the performance despite the minor mix issue.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show positively (4‑5 stars) and note strong playing, while one points out a bass mix problem; recording is good but not perfect, yielding an overall rating in the low‑to‑mid 4‑star range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Bass channel is heavily over‑driven and can be distracting; otherwise the mix is clear and guitar work shines. EQ tweak on bass flat recommended.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Two acoustic sets lead into a full electric set, providing a satisfying contrast and maintaining momentum throughout the show.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Guitar "cuts heads" and carries the performance despite bass issues.
